enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of
the crops raised, as determined by the State Level Bankers' Committee
(SLBC) in each State;
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as determined by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'doubtful asset' shall mean an asset which has remained in the
substandard category for a period of twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: has remained in the substandard category for a period of twelve months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) 'exposure' shall include all funded and non-funded exposures (including
underwriting and similar commitments).
enriched_requirements.object: non-funded exposures (including underwriting and similar commitments)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'long duration crops' shall mean crops with crop season longer than one
year;
enriched_requirements.object: season longer than one year

conditions:
where loss has been identified by a bank
or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by the
Reserve Bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'loss asset' shall mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank
or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by the
Reserve Bank, but the amount has not been written off wholly by the
bank;
enriched_requirements.object: loss has been identified by a bank or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by the Reserve Bank, but the amoun

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'non-performing asset' shall mean an asset, including a leased asset,
which has ceased to generate income for a bank;
enriched_requirements.object: a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'out of order status' - a cash credit / overdraft (CC / OD) account shall
be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied:
Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in sub
paragraph (iii) above shall be inclusive of the day for which the day-
end process is being run.
enriched_requirements.object: of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in sub paragraph (

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: The definition of 'out of order' shall be applicable to
all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including
those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail interest
repayments as the only credits.
enriched_requirements.object: credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a bank under any credit facility shall
be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of the
regulations contained in this Chapter, which shall inter alia include the following
principles / components:
(1) the policy of income recognition shall be objective and based on record
of recovery rather than on any subjective considerations;
enriched_requirements.object: policy for the implementation of the regulations contained in this Chapter, which shall inter alia include the following princi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) the policy shall specify the level to which the floating provisions can be
created;
enriched_requirements.object: which the floating provisions can be created

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of Directors of a bank shall take all necessary steps to arrest the
deteriorating asset quality in the books and focus on improving the credit risk
management system.
enriched_requirements.object: to arrest the deteriorating asset quality in the books and focus on improving the credit risk management system

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of
cash flows in consultation with borrowers while granting loans and advances, to
facilitate prompt repayment by the borrowers and thus improve the record of
recovery in advances.
enriched_requirements.object: schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows in consultation with borrowers while granting loans and advances, to fa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
<image>
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021: <image> (1) The exact due dates for repayment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement;
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreement

conditions:
if any, to the sanction terms
/ loan agreement till full repayment of the loan
enriched_requirements.object: same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreements

conditions: In case of loans sanctioned before December 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 11 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal / review.
enriched_requirements.object: when such loans become due for renewal / review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts
sanctioned by them:
(1) Ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are covered by the
adequacy of current assets;
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of working capital accounts sanctioned by them: (1) Ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Drawing power shall be arrived at based on the stock statement which is
current;
enriched_requirements.object: on the stock statement which is current
months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The outstanding in the account based on drawing power calculated from
stock statements older than three months, shall be deemed as irregular.

Regular and ad hoc credit limits shall be reviewed / regularised not later than
three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: not later than three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction

conditions:
In case of constraints
such as non-availability of financial statements and other data from the
borrowers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of constraints
such as non-availability of financial statements and other data from the
borrowers, a bank shall furnish evidence to show that renewal/ review of credit
limits is already on and would be completed soon.
enriched_requirements.object: that renewal/ review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Stock audit at annual intervals by external agencies appointed as per the
guidelines approved by the Board shall be mandatory in cases of NPAs with
balance of ₹5 crore and above in order to enhance the reliability on stock
valuation and bring down divergence arising out of difference in assessment of
the value of security.
enriched_requirements.object: of NPAs with balance of ₹5 crore and above in order to enhance the reliability on stock valuation and bring down divergence aris

conditions: In case of NPAs with balance of ₹5 crore and above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of NPAs with balance of ₹5 crore and above, collaterals such as
immovable properties charged in favour of the bank shall be valued once in three
years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the Board of
Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the Board of Directors

conditions:
if no reply / satisfactory clarification is received
from them within one month
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall seek explanation from advocates who wrongly certify as to clear
legal titles in respect of assets or valuers who overstate the security value, by
negligence or connivance, and if no reply / satisfactory clarification is received
from them within one month, they may report their names to IBA.
enriched_requirements.object: who wrongly certify as to clear legal titles in respect of assets or valuers who overstate the security value, by negl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
IBA may
circulate the names of such advocates / valuers among its members for
consideration before availing of their services in future.
enriched_requirements.object: such advocates / valuers among its members for consideration before availing of their services in future

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall implement the following instructions to increase awareness among
the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its website, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, special mention account and
non-performing asset classification and upgradation, with specific
reference to day-end process;
enriched_requirements.object: to increase awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its website, explaining wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
enriched_requirements.object: or other appropriate media

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: its Notes to Accounts as per the requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Financial Statem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a NPA, as the
case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as a standard asset or a NPA, as the case may be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place a robust Management Information System (MIS)
mechanism for early detection of signs of distress at individual account level as
well as at segment level (asset class, industry, geographic, size, etc.).
enriched_requirements.object: robust Management Information System (MIS) mechanism for early detection of signs of distress at individual account level as well as at

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such early
warning signals should be used for putting in place an effective preventive asset
quality management framework, including a transparent restructuring
mechanism for viable accounts under distress within the prevailing regulatory
framework, for preserving the economic value of those entities in all segments.
enriched_requirements.object: in place an effective preventive asset quality management framework, including a transparent restructuring mechanism for viable ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Information Technology (IT) and MIS system of a bank should be robust and
able to generate reliable and quality information with regard to their asset quality
for effective decision making.
enriched_requirements.object: to generate reliable and quality information with regard to their asset quality for effective decision making

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There should be no inconsistencies between
information furnished under regulatory / statutory reporting and their own MIS
reporting.
enriched_requirements.object: information furnished under regulatory / statutory reporting and their own MIS reporting

conditions:
if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
enriched_requirements.object: as overdue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
enriched_requirements.object: of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of
an account at the day-end of that calendar date.
enriched_requirements.object: status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

conditions: If due date of a loan account is March 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.

conditions: If it continues to remain overdue
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: upon running day-end process on April 30, 2021 i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.

conditions: if the account continues to remain overdue

if continues to remain
overdue further
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon runn

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The classification of assets of a bank as non-performing shall be done on the
basis of objective criteria as specified at paragraphs 29 to 33 below, to ensure a
uniform and consistent application of the norms, and by taking into account the
degree of well-defined credit weaknesses.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of objective criteria as specified at paragraphs 29 to 33 below, to ensure a uniform and consistent application of the norms, and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank should have system generated segment wise information on NPAs and
restructured assets which may include data on the opening balances, additions,
reductions (upgradations, actual recoveries, write-offs etc.), closing balances,
provisions held, technical write-offs, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: opening balances, additions, reductions (upgradations, actual recoveries, write-offs etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall compute their Gross Advances, Net Advances, Gross NPAs and
Net NPAs, as per the format in Annex-I.
enriched_requirements.object: Net Advances, Gross NPAs and Net NPAs, as per the format in Annex-I

conditions:
If the debits arising out of devolvement of letters of credit or invoked guarantees
are parked in a separate account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the debits arising out of devolvement of letters of credit or invoked guarantees
are parked in a separate account, the balance outstanding in that account also
should be treated as a part of the borrower's principal operating account for the
purpose of application of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the borrower's principal operating account for the purpose of application of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as NPA if any of the following
conditions is satisfied:
(1) interest and / or instalment of principal remains overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as NPA if any of the following conditions is satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of principal remains overdue fo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) a working capital borrowal account where irregular drawings are
permitted in the account for a continuous period of 90 days even though
the unit may be working or the borrower's financial position is
satisfactory;
enriched_requirements.object: borrower's financial position is satisfactory

conditions:
where the contract provides for settlement of the
current MTM of a derivative contract before its maturity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in cases where the contract provides for settlement of the
current MTM of a derivative contract before its maturity, only the current
credit exposure (not the potential future exposure) shall be classified as
a non-performing asset after an overdue period of 90 days;
enriched_requirements.object: non-performing asset after an overdue period of 90 days

conditions:
where a bank partially or fully terminates
the derivative contract before maturity

if the amount becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full
termination of the derivative contract
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in cases where a bank partially or fully terminates
the derivative contract before maturity, at their discretion, based on
preference of the clients to reduce the notional exposure of the hedging
derivative contract, and the bank permitted payment in instalments of the
crystallized MTM of such derivative contracts (including Forex Forward
Contracts), the recievable shall be classified as non-performing asset: (i)
if the amount becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full
termination of the derivative contract;
enriched_requirements.object: asset: (i) if the amount becomes overdue for 90 days from the date of partial / full termination of the derivative con

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions in paragraph 29, an account may also be classified
as NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of this Chapter, including inter alia
paragraphs 37 to 48.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of this Chapter, including inter alia paragraphs 37 to 48

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: facility-wise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by
the borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investments
(NPI) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become
irregular.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA / Non-Performing Investments (NPI) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The classification of an asset as NPA should be based on the record of recovery.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank should not classify an advance account as NPA merely due to the
existence of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non-
availability of adequate drawing power based on the latest available stock
statement, balance outstanding exceeding the limit temporarily, non-submission
of stock statements and non-renewal of the limits on the due date, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA merely due to the existence of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non- availability of adequat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The availability of security or net worth of borrower / guarantor should not be
taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA (except to the
extent provided in paragraph 53) or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA (except to the extent provided in paragraph 53) or otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits
are recorded before the balance sheet date should be handled with care and
without scope for subjectivity.
enriched_requirements.object: and without scope for subjectivity

conditions:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available, the account should be deemed as NPA.

In other genuine cases, a bank shall furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account
to eliminate doubts on their performing status.
enriched_requirements.object: the Statutory Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bills discounted under Letter of Credit (LC) favouring a borrower may not be
classified as NPA, when any other facility granted to the borrower is classified as
NPA.

Notwithstanding paragraph 37, in case documents under LC are not accepted
on presentation or the payment under the LC is not made on the due date by the
LC issuing bank for any reason and the borrower does not immediately make
<image>
good the amount disbursed as a result of discounting of concerned bills, the
outstanding bills discounted shall immediately be classified as NPA with effect
from the date when the other facilities had been classified as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA with effect from the date when the other facilities had been classified as NPA

conditions:
In case the overdues arising from forward contracts and plain vanilla
swaps and options become NPAs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Derivative Contracts
(1) In case the overdues arising from forward contracts and plain vanilla
swaps and options become NPAs, all other funded facilities granted to
the client shall also be classified as NPA following the principle of
borrower-wise classification.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA following the principle of borrower-wise classification

conditions:
If the client concerned is also a borrower of the bank enjoying a Cash
Credit or Overdraft facility from the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If the client concerned is also a borrower of the bank enjoying a Cash
Credit or Overdraft facility from the bank, the receivables from the
derivative contract may be debited to that account on due date and the
impact of its non-payment shall be reflected in the cash credit / overdraft
facility account.
enriched_requirements.object: cash credit / overdraft facility account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The income recognition in respect of the derivative contracts classified
as NPA shall be as per paragraph 118.

Advances under consortium arrangements
(1) Asset classification of accounts under consortium shall be based on the
record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a
bearing on the recoverability of the advances.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank participating in the consortium should, therefore, arrange to get
its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express
consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its share of recovery, to
ensure proper asset classification in its books.
enriched_requirements.object: get its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its

conditions:
in case of short duration crops
and one crop season in case of long duration crops
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances to Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) / Farmers' Service
Societies (FSS) ceded to banks
(1) In respect of agricultural advances as well as advances for other
purposes granted by a bank to PACS / FSS under the on-lending system,
only that particular credit facility granted to PACS / FSS which is in
default for a period of two crop seasons in case of short duration crops
and one crop season in case of long duration crops, as the case may be,
after it has become due will be classified as NPA, and not all the credit
facilities sanctioned to a PACS / FSS.
enriched_requirements.object: become due will be classified as NPA, and not all the credit facilities sanctioned to a PACS / FSS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The other direct loans and advances, if any, granted by the bank to the
member borrower of a PACS / FSS outside the on-lending arrangement
shall become NPA even if one of the credit facilities granted to the same
borrower becomes NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: one of the credit facilities granted to the same borrower becomes NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such loans /
advances should be classified as NPA only when there is a default in
repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on the
respective due dates.
enriched_requirements.object: only when there is a default in repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on the respective due dates

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Agricultural advances
(1) Depending upon the duration of crops raised by an agriculturist, the NPA
norms as per sub-paragraphs 29(6) and 29(7) shall also be made
applicable to agricultural term loans availed of by them.
enriched_requirements.object: to agricultural term loans availed of by them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The NPA norms as per sub-paragraphs 29(6) and 29(7) shall be made
applicable only to the following credit facilities extended for agricultural
activities:
enriched_requirements.object: to the following credit facilities extended for agricultural activities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) crop loans to farmers, which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations, and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: traditional plantations, and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) crop loans to farmers which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: traditional plantations and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In respect of agricultural loans, other than those specified in sub-
paragraph (2) above, identification of NPAs shall be done on the same
basis as non-agricultural advances, which at present is the 90 days
delinquency norm.
enriched_requirements.object: same basis as non-agricultural advances, which at present is the 90 days delinquency norm

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) While fixing the repayment schedule in case of rural housing advances
granted to agriculturists under Indira Awas Yojana / Pradhan Mantri
Gram Awas Yojana and Golden Jubilee Rural Housing Finance Scheme,
a bank shall ensure that the interest / instalment payable on such
advances are linked to crop cycles.
enriched_requirements.object: / instalment payable on such advances are linked to crop cycles

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Government guaranteed advances
<image>
(1) The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government
though overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government
repudiates its guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: only when the Government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State
Government guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and
provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due
to the bank remains overdue for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In such cases, where the lending bank is able to establish through
documentary evidence that the importer has cleared the dues in full by
depositing the amount in the bank abroad before it turned into NPA in
the books of the bank, but the importer's country is not allowing the funds
to be remitted due to political or other reasons, the asset classification
may be made after a period of one year from the date the amount was
deposited by the importer in the bank abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: period of one year from the date the amount was deposited by the importer in the bank abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of Loan Exposures - The asset classification and provisioning
requirements in respect of transactions involving transfer of loans shall be as per
the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit
Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Takeout finance
(1) The asset classification norms shall be followed by the concerned bank
in whose books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the
relevant date.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned bank in whose books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the relevant date

conditions:
Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution, the lending bank shall classify the asset as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Subsequent to take over by a bank, the taking over bank shall classify
the asset as NPA from the actual date of it becoming NPA even though
the account was not in its books as on that date.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA from the actual date of it becoming NPA even though the account was not in its books as on that date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter IV-A of Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower
accounts which are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon
implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between
the date of occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan,
shall be upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation of the resolution plan

conditions: Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria laid out in these Directions

conditions:
where a subsequent restructuring
is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the afore-mentioned
Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 31J to 31R of
the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring
is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the afore-mentioned
Directions, shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
E.
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets',
'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories based on the period for which the
asset has remained non-performing and the realisability of the dues.
enriched_requirements.object: into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories based on the period for which the ass

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NPA classified as loss asset is considered uncollectible and of such little value
that its continuance as a bankable asset is not warranted although there may be
some salvage or recovery value.
enriched_requirements.object: recovery value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 33, in respect of accounts where there are potential
threats for recovery on account of erosion in the value of security or non-
availability of security and existence of other factors such as frauds committed
by borrowers, the asset should be straightaway classified as doubtful or loss
asset as appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful or loss asset as appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of paragraph 53, the following shall apply:
(1) erosion in the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the
realisable value of the security is less than 50 per cent of the value
assessed by the bank or accepted by the Reserve Bank at the time of
last inspection, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the realisable value of the security is less than 50 per cent of the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such NPAs may be straightaway
classified under doubtful category.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful category

conditions: if the realisable value of the security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) if the realisable value of the security, as assessed by the bank / approved
valuers / the Reserve Bank is less than 10 per cent of the outstanding in
the borrowal accounts, the existence of security shall be ignored and the
asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset.
enriched_requirements.object: asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only
if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

conditions: In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank, loan
accounts shall be upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon
repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit
facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank resorting to partial and technical write-offs shall not show the remaining

The provisioning shall be made on the basis of the classification of assets based
on the period for which the asset has remained non-performing and the
availability of security and the realisable value thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of the classification of assets based on the period for which the asset has remained non-performing and the availability of secur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Taking into account the time lag between an account becoming doubtful of
recovery, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the erosion
over time in the value of security charged to the bank, the bank shall make
provision against substandard assets, doubtful assets and loss assets.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, doubtful assets and loss assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For determining the amount of unsecured advances for reflecting in Schedule 9
of the published balance sheet, the rights, licenses, authorisations, etc., charged
to the bank as collateral in respect of projects (including infrastructure projects)
financed by them, should not be reckoned as tangible security.
enriched_requirements.object: security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Hence such
advances shall be reckoned as unsecured.

conditions:
where there are provisions to
compensate the project sponsor if a certain level of traffic is not achieved
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may treat annuities under build-operate-transfer (BOT) model in respect
of road / highway projects and toll collection rights, where there are provisions to
compensate the project sponsor if a certain level of traffic is not achieved, as
tangible securities subject to the condition that the right of the bank to receive
annuities and toll collection rights is legally enforceable and irrevocable.
enriched_requirements.object: (BOT) model in respect of road / highway projects and toll collection rights

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make general provision for standard assets at the following rates for
the funded outstanding on global loan portfolio basis:
<image>
(1) farm Credit to agricultural activities, individual housing loans and Small
and Micro Enterprises (SMEs) sectors at 0.25 per cent;
enriched_requirements.object: standard assets at the following rates for the funded outstanding on global loan portfolio basis: <image> (1) farm Credit t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loans to Medium Enterprises shall attract 0.40 per cent standard asset
provisioning.
The provisions on standard assets shall not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.
enriched_requirements.object: at net NPAs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall estimate the riskiness of unhedged position of their borrowers as
per the instructions on unhedged foreign currency exposures contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions,
2025 and make incremental provisions on all their exposures to such entities as
under:
Likely Loss / Earnings Before Interest
Incremental Provisioning Requirement on the total credit
and Depreciation (EBID)
exposures over and above
(per cent)
extant standard asset
provisioning Up to 15 per cent 0 More than 15 per cent and up to 30 per cent 20 bps More than 30 per cent and up to 50 per cent 40 bps More than 50 per cent and up to 75 per cent 60 bps More than 75 per cent 80 bps
<image>
Explanation: For this purpose, EBID, as defined for computation of Debt Service
Coverage Ratio (DSCR) = Profit After Tax + Depreciation + Interest on debt +
Lease Rentals, if any, shall be used.
enriched_requirements.object: unhedged position of their borrowers as per the instructions on unhedged foreign currency exposures contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025 and make incremental provisions on all their exposures to such entities as under: Likely Loss / Earnings Before Interest Incremental Provisioning Requirement on the total credit and Depreciation (EBID) exposures over and above (per cent) extant standard asset provisioning Up to 15 per cent 0 More than 15 per cent and up to 30 per cent 20 bps More than 30 per cent and up to 50 per cent 40 bps More than 50 per cent and up to 75 per cent 60 bps More than 75 per cent 80 bps <image> Explanation: For this purpose, EBID, as defined for computation of Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) = Profit After Tax + Depreciation + Interest on debt + Lease Rentals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area
Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional
specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions
subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter
IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025, a bank shall make additional specific provisioning of
five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made
under the afore-mentioned Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the afore-mentioned Direc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This additional specific provisioning
shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling
of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 68A and
68B above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation
of the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the rest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A general provision of 15 per cent on total outstanding shall be made in respect
of substandard assets without making any allowance for Export Credit Guarantee
Corporation (ECGC) guarantee cover and securities available.
enriched_requirements.object: of substandard assets without making any allowance for Export Credit Guarantee Corporation (ECGC) guarantee cover and securities av

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 70, infrastructure loan accounts which are classified
as sub-standard shall attract a provisioning of 20 per cent, in view of certain
safeguards such as escrow accounts available in respect of infrastructure
lending.
enriched_requirements.object: 20 per cent, in view of certain safeguards such as escrow accounts available in respect of infrastructure lending

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To avail of this benefit of lower provisioning, a bank shall have in place
an appropriate mechanism to escrow the cash flows and also have a clear and
legal first claim on these cash flows.
enriched_requirements.object: appropriate mechanism to escrow the cash flows and also have a clear and legal first claim on these cash flows

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of leased assets, the provisions shall be 15 percent of the sum of the
net investment in the lease and the unrealised portion of finance income net of
finance charge component.
enriched_requirements.object: the sum of the net investment in the lease and the unrealised portion of finance income net of finance charge component

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'net investment in the lease', 'finance
income' and 'finance charge' shall be as defined in 'AS 19 Leases'.
enriched_requirements.object: 'AS 19 Leases'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unsecured lease exposures, which are identified as 'substandard' shall attract
additional provision of 10 per cent, i.e., a total of 25 per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: 10 per cent, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions of 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance
is not covered by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a
valid recourse and the realisable value is estimated on a realistic basis.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a vali

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In regard to the secured portion, provision shall be made on the following basis,
at the rates ranging from 25 per cent to 100 per cent of the secured portion
depending upon the period for which the asset has remained doubtful:
Period for which the advance has remained in
Provisioning
'doubtful' category
requirement
<image>
(in per cent) Up to one year 25 One to three years 40 More than three years 100
enriched_requirements.object: following basis, at the rates ranging from 25 per cent to 100 per cent of the secured portion depending upon the period for which the a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of leased assets classified as 'Doubtful', 100 per cent of the extent to
which the finance is not secured by the realisable value of the leased asset, shall
be provided for.
Realisable value must be estimated on a realistic basis.
enriched_requirements.object: realistic basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above provision, provision at the rates specified in paragraph
75 shall be made on the sum of the net investment in the lease and the unrealised
portion of finance income net of finance charge component of the secured
portion, depending upon the period for which asset has been doubtful.
enriched_requirements.object: sum of the net investment in the lease and the unrealised portion of finance income net of finance charge component of the secured port

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Loss assets should be written off.

conditions: If loss assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If loss assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent
of the outstanding should be provided for.

conditions: if for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, if for any reason, a leased asset classified as 'Loss' is allowed to remain
in books, 100 per cent of the sum of the net investment in the lease and the
unrealised portion of finance income net of finance charge component shall be
provided for.

A bank shall hold floating provisions for 'advances' and 'investments' separately
and the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 82 and 83 shall be applicable to
floating provisions held for both 'advances' and 'investment portfolios.
enriched_requirements.object: 'advances' and 'investments' separately and the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 82 and 83 shall be applicable to floa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Principles for utilisation of floating provisions
(1) The floating provisions shall not be used for making specific provisions
as per the extant prudential guidelines in respect of non-performing
assets or for making regulatory provisions for standard assets.
enriched_requirements.object: specific provisions as per the extant prudential guidelines in respect of non-performing assets or for making regulatory provisions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The floating provisions shall be used only for contingencies under
extraordinary circumstances for making specific provisions in impaired
<image>
accounts after obtaining board's approval and with prior permission of
the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: contingencies under extraordinary circumstances for making specific provisions in impaired <image> accounts after obtaining board's a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Natural calamities and pandemics may also be
included in the general category.
enriched_requirements.object: the general category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Market category may include events such as a general melt down in the
markets, which affects the entire financial system.
enriched_requirements.object: a general melt down in the markets, which affects the entire financial system

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Among the credit category, only exceptional credit losses shall be
considered as an extra-ordinary circumstance.
enriched_requirements.object: extra-ordinary circumstance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounting of floating provisions
(1) Floating provisions shall not be reversed by credit to the profit and loss
account.
enriched_requirements.object: to the profit and loss account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Alternatively, the floating provisions may be treated as part of Tier II
capital within the overall ceiling of 1.25 per cent of total risk weighted
assets.
enriched_requirements.object: of Tier II capital within the overall ceiling of 1

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board approved policy for making provisions for standard assets at rates
higher than the regulatory minimum, shall be reviewed at least on a quarterly
basis, of the performance of various sectors of the economy to which the bank
has an exposure to evaluate the present and emerging risks and stress therein.
enriched_requirements.object: on a quarterly basis, of the performance of various sectors of the economy to which the bank has an exposure to evaluate the pres

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review may include quantitative and qualitative aspects like debt-equity ratio,
interest coverage ratio, profit margins, ratings upgrade to downgrade ratio,
sectoral non-performing assets / stressed assets, industry performance and
outlook, legal / regulatory issues faced by the sector, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: aspects like debt-equity ratio, interest coverage ratio, profit margins, ratings upgrade to downgrade ratio, sect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reviews may also
include sector specific parameters.
enriched_requirements.object: parameters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, a bank may voluntarily make specific provisions for NPAs at rates
which are higher than the rates prescribed under these Directions, to provide for
estimated actual loss in collectible amount, provided such higher rates are
approved by the Board of Directors and consistently adopted from year to year.
enriched_requirements.object: for NPAs at rates which are higher than the rates prescribed under these Directions, to provide for estimated actual loss in collectible amount

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such additional provisions shall not be considered as floating provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional provisions for NPAs, like the minimum regulatory provision on
NPAs, may be netted off from gross NPAs to arrive at the net NPAs.
enriched_requirements.object: gross NPAs to arrive at the net NPAs

conditions: in case of deposit accounts)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provisioning in respect of cases of fraud
(1) A bank shall normally provide for the entire amount due to the bank or
for which the bank is liable (including in case of deposit accounts),
immediately upon a fraud being detected.
enriched_requirements.object: entire amount due to the bank or for which the bank is liable (including in case of deposit accounts), immediately upon a fra

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Where a bank chooses to provide for the fraud over two to four quarters
and this results in the full provisioning being made in more than one
financial year, the bank shall debit 'other reserves' [i.e., reserves other
than the one created in terms of Section 17(2) of the Banking Regulation
Act 1949] by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial
<image>
year by credit to provisions.

However, the bank shall proportionately
reverse the debits to 'other reserves' and complete the provisioning by
debiting profit and loss account, in the subsequent quarters of the next
financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: to 'other reserves' and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the subsequent quarters o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances against deposits / specific instruments - advances against term
deposits, NSCs eligible for surrender, KVPs, gold ornaments, government &
other securities and life insurance policies shall attract provisioning requirements
as applicable to their asset classification status.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable to their asset classification status

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of interest suspense account
(1) Amounts held in Interest Suspense Account shall not be reckoned as

(2) Amounts lying in the Interest Suspense Account shall be deducted from
the relative advances and thereafter, provisioning as per the norms,
should be made on the balances after such deduction.
enriched_requirements.object: relative advances and thereafter, provisioning as per the norms, should be made on the balances after such deduction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances covered by ECGC guarantee
(1) In the case of advances classified as doubtful and guaranteed by ECGC,
provision shall be made only for the balance in excess of the amount
guaranteed by the ECGC.
enriched_requirements.object: the balance in excess of the amount guaranteed by the ECGC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Further, while arriving at the provision required to be made for doubtful
assets, realizable value of the securities shall first be deducted from the
outstanding balance in respect of the amount guaranteed by the ECGC
and then provision made.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding balance in respect of the amount guaranteed by the ECGC and then provision made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The amount outstanding, in excess of the guaranteed portion, shall be
provided for as per the extant guidelines on provisioning for non-
performing assets.
enriched_requirements.object: per the extant guidelines on provisioning for non- performing assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such assets should
not normally be revalued.

conditions:
In case such assets need to be revalued as per
requirement of accounting practices or for any other requirement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case such assets need to be revalued as per
requirement of accounting practices or for any other requirement, the following
procedure shall be adopted:
(1) The loss on revaluation of assets shall be booked in the Profit & Loss
Account of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: loss on revaluation of assets shall be booked in the Profit & Loss Account of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In addition to the provisioning requirement as per asset classification, the
full amount of the Revaluation Gain, if any, on account of foreign
exchange fluctuation shall be used to make provisions against the
corresponding assets.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions against the corresponding assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provisioning requirements for derivative exposures
(1) Credit exposures computed as per the current marked to market value
of the contract, arising on account of the interest rate & foreign exchange
derivative transactions, credit default swaps and gold, shall attract
provisioning requirement as applicable to the loan assets in the
'standard' category, of the concerned counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable to the loan assets in the 'standard' category, of the concerned counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All conditions applicable for treatment of the provisions for standard
assets shall also apply to the aforesaid provisions for derivative and gold
exposures.
enriched_requirements.object: aforesaid provisions for derivative and gold exposures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
at comparatively lower rates of interest in the
first few years, after which rates are reset at higher rates, shall be 2.00
per cent in view of the higher risk associated with them.

<image>
(2) The provisioning on these assets shall revert to 0.40 per cent after one
year from the date on which the rates are reset at higher rates if the
accounts remain 'standard'.

Wilful Defaulters
(1) The provisioning in respect of existing loans / exposures to companies
having director(s) (other than nominee directors of government / financial
institutions brought on board at the time of distress), whose name(s)
appear more than once in the list of wilful defaulters, shall be five per
cent in cases of standard accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: in cases of standard accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Takeout finance
<image>
(1) The lending bank and / or the taking over bank, shall make appropriate
provisions corresponding to the asset classification as per paragraph 48.
enriched_requirements.object: to the asset classification as per paragraph 48

conditions: when the asset is taken over by the taking over institution
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) As and when the asset is taken over by the taking over institution, the
lending bank may reverse the corresponding provisions.

In the case of a bank, which had achieved the one-time requirement of PCR of
seventy per cent with reference to the gross NPA position as on September 30,
2010, the surplus of the provision under PCR vis-a-vis as required as per
prudential norms shall be segregated into an account styled as 'countercyclical
provisioning buffer', computation of which may be undertaken as per the format
given in Annex II.
enriched_requirements.object: account styled as 'countercyclical provisioning buffer', computation of which may be undertaken as per the format given in Annex
used by the bank for making specific provisions for NPAs during periods of system wide downturn, with the prior approval of the Reser

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may recognise income on accrual basis only in respect of credit facilities
which are classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis only in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For credit facilities which are not classified as 'standard', including those
guaranteed by Government, income shall be recognized on actual receipt basis
i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: receipt basis i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 105, interest on advances against Term Deposits,
NSCs, KVPs, and life insurance policies may be taken to income account on the
due date, provided adequate margin is available in the accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: account on the due date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fees and commissions earned by a bank as a result of renegotiations or
rescheduling of outstanding debts shall be recognised on an accrual basis over
the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit.
enriched_requirements.object: accrual basis over the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit

conditions: where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: definition of 'restructuring' provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Direct

conditions: If any advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any advance, including bills purchased and discounted as well as a
Government guaranteed account, becomes NPA, the entire interest accrued and
credited to income account in the past periods, shall be reversed if the same is
not realised.
enriched_requirements.object: same is not realised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of NPAs, fees, commission and similar income that have accrued shall
cease to accrue in the current period and shall be reversed with respect to past
periods, if uncollected.
enriched_requirements.object: the current period and shall be reversed with respect to past periods

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of leased assets, the finance charge component of finance income [as
defined in 'AS 19 Leases')] on the leased asset which has accrued and was
credited to income account before the asset became non-performing, and
remaining unrealised, shall be reversed or provided for in the current accounting
period.
enriched_requirements.object: for in the current accounting period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On an account turning NPA, a bank shall reverse the interest already charged
and not collected by debiting Profit and Loss account and stop further application
of interest.
enriched_requirements.object: charged and not collected by debiting Profit and Loss account and stop further application of interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall continue to record such accrued interest in a Memorandum account
in their books.
enriched_requirements.object: accrued interest in a Memorandum account in their books

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of computing Gross Advances, interest recorded in the
Memorandum account should not be considered.

Interest realised on NPAs may be taken to income account provided the credits
in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities
sanctioned to the borrower concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: account provided the credits in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities sanctioned to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
towards principal or interest
due), the bank shall adopt an accounting principle and exercise the right of
appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner.
enriched_requirements.object: and exercise the right of appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Derivative contracts classified as NPA
(1) In respect of derivative contracts classified as NPA, the amount
representing unrealized income already booked on accrual basis and
taken to 'Profit and Loss a/c' shall be reversed and held in a 'Suspense
<image>
Account-Crystallised Receivables' in the same manner as done in the
case of overdue advances.
enriched_requirements.object: in a 'Suspense <image> Account-Crystallised Receivables' in the same manner as done in the case of overdue advances

conditions:
If the derivative contract is not terminated on the overdue receivable
remaining unpaid for 90 days
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) If the derivative contract is not terminated on the overdue receivable
remaining unpaid for 90 days, in addition to reversing the crystallised
receivable from Profit and Loss Account as stipulated at sub-paragraph
(1), the positive MTM pertaining to future receivables shall also be
reversed from Profit and Loss Account to another account styled as
'Suspense Account - Positive MTM'.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit and Loss Account to another account styled as 'Suspense Account - Positive MTM'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The subsequent positive changes in the MTM value shall be credited to
the 'Suspense Account - Positive MTM', not to P&L Account.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Suspense Account - Positive MTM', not to P&L Account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The subsequent decline in MTM value shall be adjusted against the
balance in 'Suspense Account - Positive MTM'.
enriched_requirements.object: balance in 'Suspense Account - Positive MTM'

conditions:
If the balance in this
account is not sufficient
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the balance in this
account is not sufficient, the remaining amount may be debited to the
P&L Account.
enriched_requirements.object: P&L Account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) On payment of the overdues in cash, the balance in the 'Suspense
Account-Crystallised Receivables' shall be transferred to the 'Profit and
Loss Account', to the extent payment is received.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Profit and Loss Account', to the extent payment is received

conditions: If the bank has other derivative exposures on the borrower
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) If the bank has other derivative exposures on the borrower, the MTMs of
other derivative exposures shall also be dealt with / accounted for in the
manner as described in this paragraph, subsequent to the crystallised /
settlement amount in respect of a particular derivative transaction being
treated as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: / accounted for in the manner as described in this paragraph, subsequent to the crystallised / settlement amount in respect of a pa

conditions:
in case a fund-based credit facility extended to a borrower is
classified as NPA
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) Similarly, in case a fund-based credit facility extended to a borrower is
classified as NPA, the MTMs of all the derivative exposures should be
treated as per this paragraph.
enriched_requirements.object: this paragraph

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Takeout finance
<image>
(1) The norms of income recognition shall be followed by the bank in whose
books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the relevant date.
enriched_requirements.object: bank in whose books the account stands as balance sheet item as on the relevant date

conditions:
Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Where the credit facility becomes NPA before take over by the taking
over institution, the lending bank should not recognise income on accrual
basis and account for the same only when it is paid by the borrower /
taking over institution (if the arrangement so provides).
enriched_requirements.object: basis and account for the same only when it is paid by the borrower / taking over institution (if the arrangement so provi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where
resolution plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve
Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025 dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.

For accounts specified at paragraph 48B of these Directions, interest
income shall be recognized on cash basis.]
F.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 43(D) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, income by way of interest
in relation to such categories of bad and doubtful debts as may be prescribed
having regard to the guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank in relation to such
debts, shall be chargeable to tax in the previous year in which it is credited to the
profit and loss account or received, whichever is earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: in the previous year in which it is credited to the profit and loss account or received, whichever is earlier

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall either make full provision as per these Directions or write-off such
advances and claim such tax benefits as are applicable, by evolving appropriate
methodology in consultation with their auditors/tax consultants.
enriched_requirements.object: as per these Directions or write-off such advances and claim such tax benefits as are applicable, by evolving appropriate m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Recoveries made in such accounts should be offered for tax purposes as per the
rules.
enriched_requirements.object: purposes as per the rules

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the
directions, instructions, and guidelines listed in the above notification shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
